name: sanctionwise
description: Screen names against the official FCDO UK Sanctions List for AI agents — indicative, not advice.
long_description: Screen a person, company or vessel name against the official FCDO UK Sanctions List to surface possible matches with the official designation details, and fetch a full entry by Unique ID. INDICATIVE name-match only — a match must be verified by a human against the official entry, and a non-match is not a clearance. Covers the UK FCDO list only; not legal, compliance or KYC/AML advice. Official data is bundled (works offline) and the tool auto-refreshes from a weekly release.

tools.name: screen_name
tools.description: Screen a person/company/vessel name against the UK Sanctions List.

tools.name: get_sanctions_entry
tools.description: Fetch the full UK Sanctions List entry for a Unique ID.
